decision_commentary: All required schema fields present: contractor_pricing_source (documented as 'Preliminary estimates from 2 local contractors in San José del Cabo, BCS — simulated in test mode'), contractor_total=600000 USD, client_budget=550000 USD (midpoint of USD 400,000–700,000 range), variance_amount=50000, variance_pct=9.09, recommendation='proceed'. Completeness 5: pricing from two sources documented; comparison clearly presented; variance calculated in both $ (50,000) and % (9.09%); explicit recommendation with rationale; line_items_summary provides 6-category breakdown of contractor pricing. Accuracy 5: variance calculation correct — (600,000-550,000)/550,000 = 9.09%. Recommendation matches data — 9.09% is within 10% proceed threshold; USD 600,000 falls within stated budget range USD 400,000–700,000. Correct recommendation = proceed. Clarity 5: 'proceed' — no ambiguity; no redesign required so no scope elements need naming. State sync 3: simulated run. Timing 5: delivered promptly after engineering package complete. Decision readiness 5: Marcela can approve or require redesign immediately. No auto-fail conditions triggered — pricing source documented, explicit recommendation present.
celia_routing_notes: Celia routing for DG-09 scored separately in segment-G-celia-routing-DG09-scorecard.json (same gate as engineering package).
